title: Barebone Create+
description: Barebone Create+ is a modpack tailor-made to turn Minecraft into a tinkerer’s paradise. Built from the Barebone base and loaded with quality-of-life mods, this pack is your playground for creativity, exploration, and smooth gameplay
body:
# 🌟 Barebone Create+ Modpack 🌟
## ✨ What Makes It Special? - **Create Mod Galore:** - Build epic contraptions with the full Create experience, expanded by _Big Cannons_, _Steam 'n' Rails_, _Deco_, _Enchantment Industry_, and more. Every machine is yours to master! - **Streamlined Minecraft Life:** - Inventory tweaks (_Carry On_, _TrashSlot_, _AppleSkin_), comfort mods (_Comforts_, _BedBenefits_), and smoother survival (_Clumps_, _Durability Tooltip_, _Smarter Farmers_) ensure you always play your way. - **Immersive World Upgrades:** - Lush visuals with _Iris_, _LambDynamicLights_, _Cull Less Leaves_, enhanced with atmospheric touches from _AmbientSounds_ and _Falling Leaves_. Exploration is exciting with _Terralith_, _Traveler’s Backpack_, and _Xaero’s Minimap & World Map_. - **Performance That Pops:** - Play lag-free thanks to _Sodium_, _Lithium_, _Indium_, _FerriteCore_, and other backend boosters—so your creative engineering never skips a beat. - **Builder’s Toolkit & QOL:** - Plan and execute massive projects with _Litematica_, _Syncmatica_, _EMI_, and _MiniHUD_. Mods like _BetterF3_ and _Jade_ make managing your world effortless and fun. *** ## 🛠️ Modpack Contents | Feature type | Highlight mods | |:--------------------:|:---------------------------------------------:| | Core Engineering | Create, Big Cannons, Slice & Dice, Power Loader | | QoL Improvements | AppleSkin, Carry On, TrashSlot, BetterF3 | | Visual & Performance | Sodium, Lithium, Indium, Iris, DynamicLights | | Exploration | Terralith, Xaero’s Minimap & World Map, Traveler’s Backpack | | Building Tools | Litematica, Syncmatica, MiniHUD, EMI | | Atmosphere | AmbientSounds, Falling Leaves, Sushi Bar, Farmer’s Delight | *** ## 🚀 Why Play Barebone Create+? - **Fresh for new players—engaging for experts.** - **Jump from inventing wild machines to exploring gorgeous, diverse biomes.** - **Build smarter, automate everything, and lose yourself in a lively, modernized Minecraft world.** ***
## Start Inventing. **Your world, your machines, your adventure.**
***

*** > ⚠️ **Important Note — Resource Pack** > Due to licensing reasons, the **Barebone resource pack is not bundled in the modpack**. > You must download it manually via the **Resource Pack tab**—either in your launcher (like Prism) or directly in-game. > The included **Resourcify** mod makes this process quick and straightforward.
